headline: Here's How Much $100 Invested In Enphase Energy 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
summary: Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) has outperformed the market over the past 10 years by 23.5% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 36.7%. Currently, Enphase Energy has a market capitalization of $5.19
